en: Jotham was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Jerushah the daughter of Zadok.
zh: 約坦登基的時候，是二十五歲；他在耶路撒冷作王共十六年；他的母親名叫耶路沙，是撒督的女兒。

en: And he did what was right in the eyes of the LORD according to all that his father Uzziah had done, except he did not enter the temple of the LORD. But the people still followed corrupt practices.
zh: 約坦行耶和華看為正的事，像他父親烏西雅一切所行的，只是沒有進入耶和華的殿；但人民還是行敗壞的事。

en: He built the upper gate of the house of the LORD and did much building on the wall of Ophel.
zh: 約坦建造了耶和華殿的上門；在俄斐勒的城牆上，他也有很多建設。

en: Moreover, he built cities in the hill country of Judah, and forts and towers on the wooded hills.
zh: 他在猶大山地建造城市，又在樹林中建造一些營寨和瞭望樓。

en: He fought with the king of the Ammonites and prevailed against them. And the Ammonites gave him that year 100 talents of silver, and 10,000 cors of wheat and 10,000 of barley. The Ammonites paid him the same amount in the second and the third years.
zh: 約坦和亞捫人的王交戰，戰勝了他們；那一年，亞捫人就獻給他三千四百公斤銀子，一千公噸小麥，一千公噸大麥；第二年和第三年，亞捫人也獻給他這個數目。

en: So Jotham became mighty, because he ordered his ways before the LORD his God.
zh: 約坦在耶和華他的 神面前堅守正道，所以日漸強盛。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all his wars and his ways, behold, they are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel and Judah.
zh: 約坦其餘的事蹟，他的一切戰爭和作為，都記在以色列和猶大列王記上。

en: He was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem.
zh: 他登基的時候是二十五歲；他在耶路撒冷作王共十六年。

en: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David, and Ahaz his son reigned in his place.
zh: 約坦和他的列祖同睡，埋葬在大衛城裡；他的兒子亞哈斯接續他作王。
